title: Starting a YouTube Channel About Bonsai

all.en: Bonsai had been my quiet hobby for almost ten years before anyone knew about it.
all.zh: 盆栽是我安靜的興趣，將近十年來沒有人知道我有在玩。

all.en: Every weekend, I would sit on my small balcony and prune my dozen little trees.
all.zh: 每個週末，我都坐在小陽台上修剪我那十多棵小樹。

all.en: My favorite was a Chinese elm I had shaped since I was a university student.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的是一棵中國榆，從大學時代我就開始為它造型。

all.en: One day, my cousin asked why I never shared what I knew with other people.
all.zh: 有一天，我表弟問我為什麼從來不把所學分享給其他人。

all.en: He suggested filming short videos because there were few channels in Mandarin about bonsai.
all.zh: 他建議我拍些短影片，因為華語界關於盆栽的頻道很少。

all.en: I was nervous about being on camera, but the idea slowly grew on me.
all.zh: 我對上鏡頭感到緊張，但這個想法漸漸吸引了我。

all.en: I bought a cheap tripod, a clip-on microphone, and used my old phone as the camera.
all.zh: 我買了便宜的三腳架、領夾式麥克風，並用舊手機當作攝影機。

all.en: My first video was about repotting a five-year-old juniper, and it took six hours to film.
all.zh: 我的第一支影片是關於重新換盆一棵五歲的杜松，光是拍攝就花了六小時。

all.en: Editing the footage took even longer because I had no idea what software to use.
all.zh: 剪輯素材花了更長的時間，因為我完全不知道要用什麼軟體。

all.en: I learned the basics from free tutorials and slowly figured out how to add subtitles.
all.zh: 我從免費教學中學了基本功，慢慢摸索出怎麼加字幕。

all.en: When I finally uploaded the video, only my cousin and my mother watched it.
all.zh: 我終於把影片上傳後，只有我表弟和我媽看了。

all.en: Still, I uploaded a new video every Sunday for three months without a single new subscriber.
all.zh: 儘管如此，我連續三個月每週日上傳一支新影片，沒有增加任何訂閱者。

all.en: Then a famous gardener in Japan shared one of my clips on his page.
all.zh: 後來一位日本知名園藝家在他的頁面上分享了我的一段影片。

all.en: Overnight, my subscriber count jumped from fourteen to over two thousand.
all.zh: 一夜之間，我的訂閱數從十四人跳到兩千多人。

all.en: Messages poured in from viewers in Vietnam, Canada, Indonesia, and even South Africa.
all.zh: 來自越南、加拿大、印尼，甚至南非的觀眾紛紛傳訊息給我。

all.en: Many of them asked basic questions, like how to choose soil and when to water.
all.zh: 他們很多人問的是基本問題，例如怎麼選土、什麼時候澆水。

all.en: I realized that beginners were my real audience, not advanced collectors at all.
all.zh: 我才發現初學者才是我真正的觀眾，根本不是進階的收藏家。

all.en: I started a beginner series and released one episode every weekend without fail.
all.zh: 我開了一個初學者系列，每個週末都準時推出一集，從不間斷。

all.en: My wife joked that the trees on the balcony now had their own talent agency.
all.zh: 我太太開玩笑說陽台上的樹現在都有自己的經紀公司了。

all.en: Within a year, my channel passed fifty thousand subscribers, which still feels unreal.
all.zh: 一年內，我的頻道突破了五萬訂閱，至今想起來仍覺得不真實。

all.en: A local nursery contacted me about a small sponsorship for tools and pots.
all.zh: 當地一家苗圃聯絡我，提供工具和盆器的小額贊助。

all.en: I accepted on one condition: they had to let me speak honestly about every product.
all.zh: 我接受了，但有個條件：他們必須讓我誠實評論每樣產品。

all.en: Honesty turned out to be the thing my viewers valued the most about my channel.
all.zh: 事實證明，誠實是觀眾最看重我頻道的特質。

all.en: Some episodes were difficult, especially when one of my old trees died of root rot.
all.zh: 有些集數很難拍，特別是我的一棵老樹因根腐病死掉的時候。

all.en: I filmed the whole sad process and explained what I had done wrong in detail.
all.zh: 我把整個傷心的過程拍下來，並詳細說明我哪裡做錯了。

all.en: That episode received the warmest comments I had ever read in my entire life.
all.zh: 那一集收到了我這輩子讀過最溫暖的留言。

all.en: Viewers shared their own losses and thanked me for not pretending to be perfect.
all.zh: 觀眾分享自己也曾失去過的盆栽，並感謝我沒有裝出一副完美的樣子。

all.en: I learned that personal growth on camera mattered more than slick production values.
all.zh: 我體會到鏡頭前的個人成長比華麗的製作效果更重要。

all.en: After two years, I organized a small meetup at a community garden in Taichung.
all.zh: 兩年後，我在台中的一個社區花園辦了一場小型聚會。

all.en: Forty people showed up with tiny trees wrapped carefully in cloth and newspaper.
all.zh: 四十個人帶著用布和報紙小心包好的小樹來到現場。

all.en: We pruned, repotted, and shared lunch under a wide shady banyan tree.
all.zh: 我們在一棵寬大遮蔭的榕樹下修剪、換盆、共進午餐。

all.en: I realized I had built more than a channel; I had built a kind community.
all.zh: 我意識到我建立的不只是一個頻道，而是一個友善的社群。

all.en: My next goal is to publish a free beginner ebook based on my most popular videos.
all.zh: 我下一個目標是根據最熱門的影片，出版一本免費的初學者電子書。

all.en: I never imagined that pruning tiny trees could connect me to so many strangers.
all.zh: 我從沒想過修剪小樹能讓我和這麼多陌生人產生連結。

all.en: Bonsai taught me patience, and YouTube taught me how to share that patience generously.
all.zh: 盆栽教會我耐心，而 YouTube 教會我如何慷慨地分享那份耐心。
